a5142bd81962.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
a5142bd81962.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
a5142bd81962.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

de95fcdc773d.title: Close the hygiene gap — 3 to 5
de95fcdc773d.description: An FSA rating of 3 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
de95fcdc773d.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

fda77271feca.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
fda77271feca.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

ab64cb2f2e55.title: Ranked #5 of 5 locally — peers are ahead
ab64cb2f2e55.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

a11bf6d4ddfc.title: Guest experience trailing — investigate what peers do differently
a11bf6d4ddfc.description: You trail peers by 1.8 points on experience. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

c6a30f4b0502.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
c6a30f4b0502.description: You trail peers by 2.0 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.
